summary: Firmware deployment reliability: exponential back-off when CDN throughput cap is hit
description: During peak firmware deployment windows the deployment orchestrator keeps retrying at full rate when the FirmwareVault CDN saturates, so module batches stall in 'Update Pending' and block the next deployment wave. Implement exponential back-off, a per-ring rollout throttle, and immediate resume-to-normal operation if an update stalls.

summary: Surface live 'On Track' production order status badge in PartnerPortal
description: PartnerPortal currently shows order status from a 4-hour-old OrderTrack cache. OEM clients complain when they see 'On Track' for orders that are actually delayed in production. Wire the live MES production telemetry into the order-status service with a freshness SLA.

summary: Supplier delivery confirmation ETA — reduce client confusion
description: OEM clients receive a 'Materials Confirmed' alert at PO placement and then later a 'Material Delayed — production rescheduled' notice with no context. Goal: surface the confirmed delivery date and outstanding PO status clearly in PartnerPortal so clients understand the delivery commitment at any point.

summary: IEC 62443 firmware signing compliance — annual attestation
description: Annual recurring task. Re-run the IEC 62443 / NIST 800-82 evidence collection and attestation for the FirmwareVault deployment pipeline. Coordinate with InfoSec and external auditor to confirm every firmware package is signed by the QT Code Signing Authority and validated at the device.

summary: PartnerPortal: SAML SSO for top-20 OEM client groups
description: Strategic OEM client groups want to use their own identity provider to access the PartnerPortal. Implement SAML 2.0 SP-initiated flow federated through IdentityVault.

summary: Bulk deactivate dormant client accounts (no activity > 36 months)
description: Privacy program requires deactivating accounts with no client activity for 36 months. Need jurisdiction-specific opt-out handling and 30-day client notice before deactivation.

summary: Migrate the production event stream from RabbitMQ to Kafka
description: RabbitMQ doesn't scale to the volume of production telemetry events generated by the expanded device population and MES integrations. Migrate the topic and consumers to Kafka.

summary: NCR push notification when corrective action is confirmed
description: Send the client a push notification when a corrective action on their NCR/CAPA case has been confirmed in QualityHub. Consent required. Includes SMS fallback scope.

summary: Replace legacy account-ID scraping for order catalog queries
description: Some order catalog queries still scrape the legacy HOST/3270 mainframe screens used by the original ERP. Move to the OrderTrack integration broker pattern per the ARB constraint.

summary: PartnerPortal: dark mode
description: Client requests via support are consistent — add a dark mode option in the PartnerPortal web interface.

summary: Two-factor authentication for the PartnerPortal
description: Compliance flagged that PartnerPortal users with access to controlled-article order data and client PII still log in with password only. Add TOTP-based 2FA federated through IdentityVault.

summary: Audit log retention extended from 3 years to 10 years for NCR/CAPA records
description: AS9100 and ITAR require NCR/CAPA audit logs to be retained for 10 years. Currently 3 years. Move older logs to cold storage after 90 days.

summary: Service history dashboard for enterprise OEM account admins
description: Enterprise account admins ask for a daily view of production events, NCR counts, and delivery performance by order and account across their enterprise. Currently they pull three separate reports.

summary: Remote diagnostic command ETA accuracy on slow connections
description: PartnerPortal ETA for remote diagnostic command acknowledgement is consistently 3-5 seconds optimistic on industrial plant Wi-Fi. Recalibrate using actual round-trip throughput data from the diagnostic control plane.

summary: Email-to-case ingestion for client NCR reports
description: OEM clients email NCR reports to quality@quantumtechnologies.com. These currently land in a shared inbox. Parse and create a structured QualityHub case per report.

summary: Production order ranking: factor in client delivery preferences
description: Personalise production order priority suggestions based on the client's stated delivery constraints and historical order patterns. A/B test against the unpersonalised baseline.

summary: In-portal invoice payment: credit card and ACH for client invoices
description: Today invoice payments accept only bank wire via the legacy billing portal. Add credit card and ACH token acceptance in the PartnerPortal via InvoiceGateway.

summary: OCR for scanned quality inspection documents
description: Some client-submitted quality documents and inspection reports are scanned or faded. OCR them at upload so the quality team can search by order ID, NCR number, and part number.

summary: Rate-limit the public order-status API
description: The public production order status endpoint is being scraped by third parties. Add per-IP and per-API-key throttling to protect the 600ms p95 latency budget.

summary: REACH/RoHS compliance mapping for new industrial automation product lines
description: We launched three new sensor assembly product lines for industrial automation OEM clients. Component compliance declarations for these SKUs are not yet mapped in ComponentID. Missing declarations block COA generation and shipment release.

summary: Client support agent note templates for NCR cases
description: Senior support agents want reusable note templates for common NCR case types (dimensional non-conformance, material substitution, documentation gap). Currently each agent copies from a personal document.

summary: Migrate batch jobs from cron to Airflow
description: Nightly batch jobs (production schedule recalc, ITAR export report) run from a single crontab with no observability. Move to Airflow with retries and SLA alerts.

summary: Post-support NPS survey after client service appointment
description: Send a 3-question NPS survey by push notification 24 hours after a confirmed client field-service appointment. Opt-in only.

summary: Encrypt PII columns at rest in the client database
description: Client contact name, billing address, and payment instrument reference are stored in plain text in Postgres. Use column-level encryption with KMS-managed keys.

summary: Onboarding checklist automation for new client support agents
description: Manual onboarding for new client support agents involves 12 steps across 5 systems. Build a single workflow with status tracking.

summary: Real-time fraud scoring on trial order redemption
description: Trial production orders are being abused — accounts submitted shortly after account takeover. Score every trial order extension request against a fraud model.

summary: Version history for quality inspection records
description: When a quality engineer edits an inspection record in QualityHub, the previous version is overwritten. AS9100 requires an immutable audit trail. Keep version history with the original on every edit.

summary: Decommission the legacy regional pricing service for standard product packages
description: Read-only mirror of regional standard product pricing still runs on the old service. Migrate remaining consumers to the central OrderTrack pricing API and shut it down (saves ~$8k/month).

summary: Localise the PartnerPortal to Spanish and French
description: Many of our OEM client contacts in Mexico, Spain, and Canada are most comfortable in Spanish or French. Add es-MX, es-ES, and fr-CA translations for the PartnerPortal.

summary: Peak firmware deployment window: ephemeral CDN capacity pre-warm
description: Major firmware release nights cause the FirmwareVault CDN to hit throughput limits. Pre-warm edge capacity ahead of planned deployment waves and set auto-scaling policies appropriately.

summary: Replace deprecated AWS SDK v1 calls before EOL
description: AWS Java SDK v1 reaches end of life next year. Migrate the remaining ~45 call sites across telemetry and firmware-deployment services to SDK v2.
